creator: wfd@ssinc.com
text:
The /usr/ports/shells/ksh93 port refers to ast-base-98.bsd.i386; however, the version currently available on the AT&T web site is ast-base-98.bsd.i386.

Fix: 

Port needs to be updated, or AT&T needs to be persuaded to make earlier versions available as well.
How-To-Repeat: Try to download the specified .tgz file from AT&T; it is no longer available, and therefore impossible to use this port.
